allow: Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 lifecycle get /slam_toolbox 2>/dev/null || echo "not a lifecycle node"; ros2 node info /slam_toolbox 2>/dev/null | head -30)
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox configure && sleep 2 && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox activate && echo "SLAM activated")
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 topic echo /scan --once 2>/dev/null | grep -E "range_min|range_max|ranges" | head -5)
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox configure && sleep 2 && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox activate && ros2 lifecycle get /slam_toolbox)
Bash(sleep 6 && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 topic echo /scan --once 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 "^ranges:" | head -10)
Bash(sleep 6 && tmux capture-pane -t swarm:launch.2 -p | grep -v "^$" | tail -12)

Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 param get /slam_toolbox use_sim_time 2>/dev/null && ros2 topic echo /clock --once 2>/dev/null && ros2 topic echo /scan --field header.stamp --once 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sleep 18 && tmux capture-pane -t swarm:launch.2 -p | grep -v "^$" | tail -20)
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox configure && sleep 2 && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox activate)
Bash(sleep 8 && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 topic echo /map --field info --once 2>/dev/null)
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 pkg list | grep foxglove)
Bash(sleep 4 && tmux capture-pane -t swarm:foxglove -p | grep -v "^$" | tail -10)
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 topic pub /cmd_vel geometry_msgs/msg/Twist '{linear: {x: 0.0}, angular: {z: 0.0}}' --once 2>/dev/null && echo "stopped")
Bash(sleep 15 && tmux capture-pane -t swarm:launch.0 -p | grep -v "^$" | tail -8)
Bash(sleep 8 && tmux capture-pane -t swarm:launch.2 -p | grep -v "^$" | tail -10)
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox configure && sleep 2 && ros2 lifecycle set /slam_toolbox activate && echo "SLAM active")
Bash(source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rraina/swarm_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 topic pub --once /cmd_vel geometry_msgs/msg/Twist "{linear: {x: 0.0}, angular: {z: 0.0}}" 2>&1)
